name: I'm in an engine room
hints: The engine room below the cabin. The engine can be started and climbed on.
GO ENGINE to climb on top of it and search for hidden items. Be careful about starting or stopping the engine.
GO ENGINE climbs on top (room 17). START ENGINE needs a working battery. STOP ENGINE is FATAL! UP returns to the cabin (room 2).
Climb the engine (GO ENGINE) to search it. Never STOP ENGINE - it kills you. START ENGINE only works with a charged battery. UP goes to the cabin.
notes: Engine room below the cabin. GO ENGINE climbs on top (room 17). START ENGINE initially fails due to dead battery - need to charge it first. STOP ENGINE is FATAL. UP returns to cabin (room 2). The battery needs to be recharged before the engine can start.
